Name: File Transfer
Description: Download a file from a URL to the operation's staging directory. Streams the download — no base64 encoding. When SourceLocalPath is provided (set by resolve-address with a shared-fs strategy), the task short-circuits and returns that path directly without copying anything. Logs bytes transferred and duration for visibility in the manifest.

SettingsInputs.Name: SourceURL
SettingsInputs.Description: URL to download from. Required unless SourceLocalPath is provided.

SettingsInputs.Name: SourceLocalPath
SettingsInputs.Description: Absolute filesystem path to read directly. When set and the file exists, the HTTP download is skipped entirely and BytesTransferred reports 0. Used by the shared-fs reachability strategy.

SettingsInputs.Name: Filename
SettingsInputs.Description: Filename to save as in the staging directory. Required unless SourceLocalPath is provided.

SettingsInputs.Name: AffinityKey
SettingsInputs.Description: Affinity key for caching (same key skips re-download)

StateOutputs.Name: LocalPath
StateOutputs.Description: Absolute path to the file (downloaded to staging, or pointing at the shared-fs source when no copy was needed)

StateOutputs.Name: BytesTransferred
StateOutputs.Description: Size of the downloaded file in bytes (0 when shared-fs zero-copy was used)
